description: Paper-trading track record — 100% SIMULATED. No real money, no wallet, no keys. Updated each time the user says 'go' with live price data.

rules.selection: highest-conviction signal from `npm run play` output (not random)
rules.control: optional parallel random pick, to test signals vs luck
rules.marking: each 'go', the prior open position is marked to the new price (a ~1-day hold), then a new pick is opened
rules.data_source: live prices pasted by the user each round; the assistant cannot fetch prices from its sandbox

open_positions.name: Pudgy Penguins
open_positions.thesis: Top-tier liquid Solana meme (surfaced as a current leader with ~$73M/24h volume). Buying into a modest pullback (-1.9% 24h, -11.7% 7d) on a strong-community name rather than chasing a thin micro-cap. Daily mark-to-market.
